summary: Phase 2 Admin CMS (Blog + News CRUD) end-to-end testing — full UI flows + API + security regression. ALL CRITICAL TESTS PASS. Backend pytest: 19/19 PASS. Playwright UI flows: 14/14 PASS (login, dashboard 6-tile, blog nav+create+edit+toggle+delete+empty+validation, news nav+create+edit+toggle+delete). Critical security fix verified: proxy no longer leaks cookies between unauth/auth/unauth sequence on /api/admin/blog.

test_results.backend_pytest: 19/19 PASS (test_admin_cms_security.py): 12 unauth-401 cases (blog/news/jobs/apps/messages/settings × methods), 1 cookie-leak regression PASS, blog CRUD lifecycle PASS, news CRUD lifecycle PASS, 4 public-page smoke PASS.
test_results.ui_dashboard_tiles: PASS — page contains Blog and News (6-tile layout confirmed)
test_results.ui_blog_empty_or_existing: PASS — empty state rendered when no posts; or existing rows when present
test_results.ui_blog_validation: PASS — saving with empty FR+EN titles shows toast 'Title (FR + EN) is required' and does NOT submit to API
test_results.ui_blog_create: PASS — modal CRUD, FR/EN locale tabs, save → modal closes, row appears with title 'Lancement de la Super App'
test_results.ui_blog_edit: PASS — clicking edit pre-fills modal (verified prefilled titleFr exactly == 'Lancement de la Super App'); update propagates to row
test_results.ui_blog_toggle_publish: PASS — pill flips Published → Draft via PUT (no error toast)
test_results.ui_blog_delete: PASS — confirm dialog accepted, row disappears, 'Deleted' toast shown
test_results.api_security_unauth_401: PASS — all of GET/POST/PUT/DELETE on /api/admin/{blog,news,jobs,apps,messages,settings} return 401 {ok:false,error:'unauthorized'} without cookie
test_results.api_security_no_cookie_leak: PASS (CRITICAL) — sequence unauth(401) → auth(200) → unauth(401) confirmed; httpx.AsyncClient.cookies.clear() before each forwarded request + cookies={} on per-request call works as intended

critical_code_review_comments: BlogManager.tsx & NewsManager.tsx are single-file ~300 LOC each; acceptable but Field/LocaleTab helpers could be lifted to /components/ui for reuse across the two managers (currently duplicated).

togglePublish in BlogManager.tsx (line 85-93) optimistically updates UI but does NOT roll back on PUT failure — if the network/PUT fails the UI is permanently out of sync with DB. Recommend reverting state on !res.ok and toast.error.
remove() in BlogManager.tsx uses window.confirm — works but a styled confirm modal would match the rest of the admin design.

Security fix in /app/backend/server.py (cookies=None on AsyncClient + _client.cookies.clear() before each call + cookies={} per-request) is solid defense-in-depth and verified via automated regression test (test_proxy_does_not_leak_cookies_between_calls).
Backend tests originally used field name 'coverImage' for News — actual prisma model uses 'image'. Fixed in test file.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_cms_security.py (NEW — 19-case regression suite for admin CRUD + cookie-leak security)
seed_data_creation: Test data (TEST_ slug-prefixed posts/articles, 'launch-2026-test*' and 'press-release-1-test*') was created and cleaned up by the same test runs. No residual test data in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin CMS Blog/News fully verified. All testids in place: blog-manager, blog-create-btn, blog-row-<id>, blog-edit-<id>, blog-toggle-<id>, blog-delete-<id>, blog-tab-{fr,en}, blog-field-{slug,category,image,titleFr,titleEn,excerptFr,excerptEn,contentFr,contentEn,metaTitleFr,metaTitleEn,metaDescFr,metaDescEn,published}, blog-save-btn, blog-empty (same pattern for news-*). News uses field name 'image' not 'coverImage'. Sidebar nav testids: admin-nav-{dashboard,applications,messages,careers,blog,news,settings}. Cookie-leak proxy bug fix confirmed working in production proxy at port 8001.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — main agent already RCAed and fixed the httpx.AsyncClient shared-cookie-jar issue. Verified via test_proxy_does_not_leak_cookies_between_calls.
